profile.name: Charmy Dhawan
profile.title: AI & Automation Engineer · IT Engineering Student
profile.tagline: I build agentic AI systems, backend services, and automation tools — the kind of projects that force me to learn something new along the way.

sections.title: About
sections.content: Charmy Dhawan is an Information Technology engineering student at Thadomal Shahani Engineering College, Mumbai (2023-2027), currently working as an AI and Automation Engineer intern at Larsen & Toubro. Charmy's work centers on AI/ML, agentic systems built with LangChain and LangGraph, and backend engineering with Python, FastAPI, and relational databases. Charmy is always chasing the next challenging build — the kind that forces learning something new along the way — and is preparing for M.Tech applications with a focus on AI/ML and databases/backend systems.

sections.title: Projects Overview
sections.content: Charmy has built six notable projects: (1) LLM Task Automation Agent — a LangChain/LangGraph agentic system orchestrating nine tools for multi-step task automation, Charmy's flagship AI project; (2) AI Job Hunter — a local AI-powered job and internship aggregator with fuzzy skills-alignment ranking and a Flask dashboard; (3) Robotic Arm Motion Simulator — a Python kinematics engine (2D CCD + 3D DH-parameter/Jacobian IK) paired with an interactive Three.js frontend; (4) Biker NFC Tag — an emergency medical ID system for riders via QR/NFC scanning; (5) FactSure — an AI misinformation detection platform built at Mumbai Hacks hackathon, where Charmy contributed the claim, URL, and image verification agents plus the Chrome extension; (6) This AI Portfolio — the very site you're on right now, built by Charmy with React, TypeScript, Vite, FastAPI, and the Groq API — I am the assistant you're speaking with.

sections.title: Education
sections.content: Charmy is pursuing a B.E. in Information Technology at Thadomal Shahani Engineering College, Mumbai (2023-2027). Charmy is also actively preparing applications for M.Tech programs, with core technical interests in AI/Machine Learning and databases/backend systems.

sections.title: Work Experience
sections.content: Charmy's work experience: (1) AI and Automation Engineer, Larsen & Toubro (Jun 2026 - Aug 2026) — building AI and automation solutions, including work on an internal HR feedback platform with a stack spanning FastAPI-style Python services, PostgreSQL, Redis, Azure Blob Storage, Keycloak, SAP SuccessFactors integration, and Docker Compose; designed a bulk employee report download feature end to end. (2) Robotics Engineer, 3diotec (Jan 2026 - May 2026) — robotics engineering projects involving 3D printing and SolidWorks-based design and prototyping. (3) Marketing Team Lead & Customer Relations Intern, Viral Fission (Jul 2020 - Jul 2022) — executed digital marketing strategies for customer acquisition and retention while managing client communication.

sections.title: Project: LLM Task Automation Agent
sections.content: LLM Task Automation Agent (llm-agent): an agentic task automation system built from scratch with LangChain 1.x and LangGraph. It orchestrates nine tools — including sandboxed file I/O — through a graph-based agent loop, letting a language model plan and execute multi-step tasks safely. This is Charmy's flagship AI/agentic-systems project.

sections.title: Project: AI Job Hunter
sections.content: AI Job Hunter (ai-jobhunter, Python): a local AI-powered job and internship hunter that aggregates listings from pluggable sources (such as Adzuna and Remotive), ranks them by fit against Charmy's skill profile using fuzzy skills-alignment matching, and provides a rich CLI plus a Flask dashboard for reviewing, saving searches, and tracking applications.

sections.title: Project: Robotic Arm Motion Simulator
sections.content: Robotic Arm Motion Simulator (robotic-arm-simulator): a robotic arm motion simulator combining a Python kinematics engine — 2D CCD inverse kinematics plus 3D DH-parameter/Jacobian-based IK — with an interactive Three.js/canvas frontend for visualizing arm motion in real time.

sections.title: Project: Biker NFC Tag
sections.content: Biker NFC Tag (biker-nfc-tag): an emergency medical ID system for riders — scanning a QR code or NFC tag on a helmet instantly surfaces the rider's blood group, allergies, and medical history to first responders.

sections.title: Project: FactSure (Mumbai Hacks)
sections.content: FactSure (Mumbai Hacks hackathon): an AI-powered misinformation detection platform. Charmy contributed to the claim, URL, and image verification agents and the Chrome extension.

sections.title: Project: AI Portfolio
sections.content: I am the AI Portfolio — the very project you're interacting with right now. Charmy built me using React, TypeScript, and Vite on the frontend, with FastAPI on the backend and the Groq API (llama-3.3-70b-versatile model) powering my conversational responses. My knowledge base uses keyword-scored retrieval to ground my answers in Charmy's actual experience. The visual design features a WebGL fluid simulation background (webgl-fluid-enhanced), a dark theme, and a section-switching single-page architecture. I exist to showcase Charmy's work and let visitors ask natural-language questions about Charmy's skills, projects, and background — rather than just reading a static page.

sections.title: Skills
sections.content: Languages: Python (preferred), Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, SQL. AI/ML & Agentic Systems: LangChain, LangGraph, scikit-learn, NumPy, Pandas; working exposure to TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face, and OpenCV. Backend: FastAPI, Flask, REST API design. Databases & Infra: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, Azure Blob Storage, Keycloak, Docker & Docker Compose, Git/GitHub. Other: SolidWorks and 3D-printing workflows from robotics work.

sections.title: Leadership & Community
sections.content: Charmy is an active member of the GENZ Rotaract Club of Parleshwar and has volunteered in stage operations for community events, alongside earlier team-lead experience managing customer relations at Viral Fission.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: You can reach Charmy at charmydhawan@gmail.com, on LinkedIn at linkedin.com/in/charmy-dhawan-a3969626b, or on GitHub at github.com/Charmbytes. Charmy is based in Andheri (W), Mumbai, and is open to AI/ML and backend engineering opportunities, collaborations, and M.Tech-related conversations.

fallback_responses.greeting: Hi! I'm Charmy's AI assistant. Ask me about Charmy's projects, skills, work experience, education, or how to get in touch.
fallback_responses.unknown: I don't have that in Charmy's knowledge base yet. I can tell you about Charmy's background, projects (like the LLM Task Automation Agent or AI Job Hunter), skills, work experience at Larsen & Toubro and 3diotec, education, or contact details.
